customers.title: Customer Operations
customers.description: Support and lifecycle surface for end users, wallets, subscriptions, and operational intervention.
customers.currentState: Customer directory and card are now live on top of dedicated mobile-user admin APIs, wallet flows, payments, referral data, and partner context.
customers.backendCoverage: Partial coverage. The core read/update customer surface is live, but subscription timelines, recovery tooling, and staff notes still need dedicated workflows.
customers.nextFocus: Deepen customer operations with support actions, recovery tooling, timeline visibility, and richer intervention history.

availableNow.customerDirectory: Searchable mobile-user directory with lifecycle and partner filters.
availableNow.customerDetail: Operational customer card with identity, wallet, payments, referral, and partner context.
availableNow.walletTopups: Wallet deposits and payment-linked balance movements.
availableNow.partnerPromotions: Direct partner promotion from the customer card and growth surfaces.

nextModules.supportToolkit: Manual support actions like lock reasons, targeted intervention flows, and safer overrides.
nextModules.subscriptionTimeline: Unified subscription and access timeline for each customer.
nextModules.manualRecovery: Recovery flows for account access, device resets, and incident response.
nextModules.staffNotes: Persistent staff notes and internal case context for customer operations.

commerce.title: Commerce Control
commerce.description: Revenue operations for plans, payment rails, wallet movement, and withdrawal moderation.
commerce.currentState: Commerce is one of the strongest backend domains: plans, history, subscription templates, wallet flows, and withdrawal moderation endpoints are already present.
commerce.backendCoverage: Strong coverage with enough read and write APIs to ship a useful revenue-operations module immediately.
commerce.nextFocus: Move from overview into payment detail, manual corrections, refund resync, and billing investigation flows.

availableNow.plans: Plan catalog and pricing management primitives.
availableNow.subscriptionTemplates: Subscription templates and billing structure signals.
availableNow.payments: Platform payment history with filtering by user.
availableNow.walletOperations: Wallet balances, transactions, and payout-related state.
availableNow.withdrawalApprovals: Approve or reject pending withdrawal requests.

nextModules.paymentDetail: Payment detail investigation with provider context.
nextModules.manualCorrections: Manual balance and payment correction workflows.
nextModules.billingOps: Operational billing console for disputes and escalation.

growth.title: Growth Console
growth.description: Acquisition and retention surface for promo mechanics, partner signals, invites, and referral programs.
growth.currentState: Growth now has live promo inventory, invite generation, partner directory, and referral analytics, but deeper abuse handling and payout operations are still separate concerns.
growth.backendCoverage: Partial coverage. Core admin-safe growth surfaces are live, but moderation, payout tooling, and invite inventory still need expansion.
growth.nextFocus: Add abuse controls, payout operations, and deeper attribution diagnostics on top of the current live growth inventory.

availableNow.promoCodes: Promo code inventory and validation primitives.
availableNow.inviteCodes: Invite code generation and redemption visibility.
availableNow.partnerPromotion: Partner promotion plus live partner directory and drill-down context.
availableNow.referralSignals: Referral overview, top referrers, and recent commission analytics.

nextModules.growthSettings: Unified growth settings across promotions and referral rules.
nextModules.abuseReview: Abuse review for invite, promo, and referral misuse.
nextModules.payoutOps: Payout-oriented operations for partner and referral earnings.
nextModules.inviteInventory: Inventory and lifecycle tracking for invite-code batches.
nextModules.fraudSignals: Fraud and anomaly signals across acquisition channels.

infrastructure.title: Infrastructure Control
infrastructure.description: Fleet operations for servers, hosts, profiles, plugins, Helix, and XRay-related runtime surfaces.
infrastructure.currentState: Infrastructure is backend-ready and already exposes the broadest set of operational APIs in the system.
infrastructure.backendCoverage: Strong coverage. This domain can support a full admin module with monitoring, rollout, and node operations.
infrastructure.nextFocus: Add dedicated rollout tooling, per-node drill-down, and configuration diff workflows.

availableNow.servers: Server inventory, status, and aggregate statistics.
availableNow.helix: Helix control surfaces already exposed by backend routes.
availableNow.xray: XRay-related operational endpoints and configuration signals.

nextModules.inbounds: Inbound rule management and traffic entry points.
nextModules.snippets: Reusable config snippets and deployment presets.
nextModules.rolloutConsole: Rollout console with staged execution and blast-radius controls.

security.title: Security Posture
security.description: Administrative trust surface for sessions, 2FA, anti-phishing, and privileged access hardening.
security.currentState: Core security primitives already exist and the admin app itself now runs with role checks and a 2FA-only login contour.
security.backendCoverage: Strong coverage for first release. The base is in place for session monitoring and privileged access governance.
security.nextFocus: Layer anomaly detection, action reason capture, and device trust on top of the current auth foundation.

availableNow.adminSessions: Session-aware admin access model with protected dashboard access.
availableNow.twoFactor: Email/password login gated by mandatory 2FA flow.
availableNow.antiPhishing: Anti-phishing code primitives and profile security signals.
availableNow.authHardening: Role-based access checks and hardened session flow.

nextModules.sessionAnomalies: Suspicious session detection and review queue.
nextModules.securityPosture: Central posture dashboard for trust and auth health.
nextModules.privilegedReasons: Reason capture for sensitive admin actions.
nextModules.deviceTrust: Device trust and verified operator workspace controls.

governance.title: Governance & Audit
governance.description: Operational governance surface for privileged actions, webhooks, staff onboarding, and future policy control.
governance.currentState: Audit logs, webhook logs, and admin invites are already exposed. The missing layer is staff directory management and system configuration governance.
governance.backendCoverage: Partial coverage. Strong audit visibility exists, but system configuration and richer staff-management APIs are still missing.
governance.nextFocus: Ship the first governance workspace around audit, invites, and webhook forensics, then add admin directory and policy controls.

availableNow.auditLog: Privileged action trail from backend audit log.
availableNow.webhookLog: Webhook processing visibility and failure context.
availableNow.adminInvites: Invite lifecycle for onboarding new admin staff.
availableNow.policyVisibility: Baseline visibility into current governance surfaces.

nextModules.adminDirectory: Staff directory with role, status, and ownership visibility.
nextModules.staffRoleChanges: Role change workflows and approval history.
nextModules.systemConfig: System configuration editor with safety rails.
nextModules.forensicFilters: Deep filtering and forensic investigation tools.

integrations.title: Integration Operations
integrations.description: Operational surface for Telegram, realtime delivery, bot-linked flows, and callback visibility.
integrations.currentState: The backend already exposes Telegram, bot, and webhook-related capabilities, but operator visibility is still spread across multiple areas.
integrations.backendCoverage: Partial coverage. The platform has meaningful integration primitives, but the admin UI still needs consolidation and diagnostics.
integrations.nextFocus: Create one integration health surface that combines delivery state, bot controls, and realtime diagnostics.

availableNow.botConfigAccess: Bot configuration access paths and related backend coverage.
availableNow.websocketTickets: Low-level websocket and callback signals already visible in backend domains.

nextModules.integrationHealth: Health overview for external integrations and callbacks.
